rationale.R1.2: If the intent is critical review, verifying that the self-preference finding, the BT-score aggregation, and the JudgeFix correction chain are internally coherent is load-bearing; the causal narrative (blinded protocol → preference inflation → calibration fix) can be checked for logical gaps.
rationale.R1.3: The text makes sharp quantitative claims (11.3 pp win-rate inflation, 8.4% rationale mentions, reduction to 1.9%, κ=0.81) that are only as credible as the experimental design supporting them; evidence-claim alignment is central if any critical reading is intended.
rationale.R1.6: If the intent is editorial or prose feedback, sentence-level clarity and paragraph cohesion of this benchmark description are the load-bearing task.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for writing and prose feedback on this text, or for a critical evaluation of whether its empirical claims and internal reasoning hold up?
